title: Hearty Vegetarian Tofu Wraps
description: Savory and gooey vegetarian wraps reminiscent of Venezuelan dishes, perfect for a weeknight meal.
instructions: Blend the Toynabe Tofu with lime juice, garlic, cumin powder, and salt until smooth.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add chopped onions and sauté for about 5 minutes until they soften.
Add diced bell peppers to the onion mixture and cook for another 3-4 minutes or until peppers are soft and translucent.
Transfer the tofu mixture into the pan with vegetables, reduce heat to low, and let it simmer for at least 10 minutes stirring occasionally.
Serve hot inside lettuce leaves or whole wheat wraps as a filling.
